meaning: adj.不值得的,不足取的n.不足道的,卑劣的家伙
examples: He considered himself unworthy of the honour they had bestowed on him.
Such opinions are unworthy of educated people.
You may feel unworthy of the attention and help people offer you.
To dismiss it as unworthy of fighting for is to dismiss the possibility of discrimination entirely.
When will Hollywood start tightening its belt on bloated star salaries and unworthy production budgets?
